title: Define Wave 35 manager assignment decision timeline contract
description: Extend architecture docs with additive assignment decision summary fields, normalized timeline event semantics, and the manager UI state map for completed, reassigned, cancelled, and evidence-backed assignment decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture docs define additive decision_summary and enriched timeline metadata for assignment detail payloads
UI/UX map documents active, completed, cancelled, reassigned, unauthorized, and session-expired detail states
Module map clarifies backend and mobile ownership for decision summary, evidence indicators, and timeline rendering
